summary: Script demonstrates Bash fundamentals (set -euo pipefail, quoting, error handling) but sed replacement is fragile: doesn't escape special chars in version strings (dots match any char) and assumes specific JSON spacing. Workflow well-structured (pinned actions, matrix tests, dependencies) but fatally references non-existent files (test/version_bumper.bats, test/fixtures/*), making it non-functional. Deliverable incomplete—unmaintainable without creating referenced fixtures/tests.
